title: Uncraftable No More
description: Want to craft items that were not originally craftable? This mod does just that!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
**Uncraftable No More** restores balance to survival mode by adding crafting recipes for items that previously had none. Perfect for survival purists, recipe overhauls, or progression-based modpacks. No more searching for treasure chests — now you can craft them yourself!

Want to craft a Name Tag or an Enchanted Golden Apple? Now you can!
![Enchanted Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836225e751026388d0204e3ece2fb497281eab8b.png)

![Name Tag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4423a659dca37354bb40a616d2b02da891e3d629.png)

## Craftable items include:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bell
- Brown Dye
- Brown Mushroom Block
- Cobweb
- Copper Horse Armor
- Copper Nautilus Armor
- Crying Obsidian
- Chainmail Armor
- Diamond Horse Armor
- Diamond Nautilus Armor
- Dragon Egg
- Dragon Head
- Elytra
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Gilded Blackstone
- Golden Horse Armor
- Golden Nautilus Armor
- Green Dye
- Iron Horse Armor
- Iron Nautilus Armor
- Large Fern
- Lodestone
- Mushroom Stem
- Name Tag
- Nautilus Shell
- Red Mushroom Block
- Saddle
- Slimeball
- Tall Grass
- Totem of Undying
- Trident
  
</details>
